slides.title: Your immune system *trains* while you sleep.
slides.sub: Deep sleep is when the body files away how to fight infection. Here is the link between rest and resilience.

slides.title: Sleep builds immune memory
slides.body: During deep sleep the body consolidates *immune memory*: the same overnight process that locks in what you learned by day.

slides.title: T-cells do their work
slides.body: Deep sleep can support T-cell function, the immune cells that recognize threats and *remember them* for next time.

slides.title: A stronger antibody response
slides.body: Good sleep around a vaccine is linked to a *better antibody response*, helping your defenses respond when it counts.

slides.title: Short sleep cuts both ways
slides.body: A run of short nights may leave you *more prone to getting sick* and slower to bounce back afterward.

slides.title: Protect your deep sleep
slides.body: Consistent timing, a cool dark room and morning light *can support* the deep sleep your immune system depends on.

slides.title: Rest that *works for you*.
slides.body: Vibe Health tracks your sleep, food, movement and steps, then turns them into one daily Health Score so better nights are easy to see.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
The night you spend asleep is the night your immune system gets stronger. 😴🌿

Deep sleep can support T-cell function and a healthier antibody response, while short nights may leave you more open to getting sick. Save this for your next early night. 🔖
